prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件 （论文数据造假、院长被免职等）；抖音热度排名第26（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022年河南断档事件曾引发高关注，2025年投档线暴跌至604分亦有媒体报道，整体舆 情偏负面但关注度不低；土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、建筑学A、交通运输工程A、风景园林学A等 17个A-及以上学科，工科实力全国顶尖；985、211、双一流高校；软科2026年主榜第18名（Top20），近年排名稳定在14–18名区间，学校层次极高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，土木建筑专业明显劝退；广东省物理类考生2025年4 4.0万人→2026年45.6万人，增加约3.6%，竞争进一步加剧；同济大学位于上海，对广东考生吸引 力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年考生规模增加约3.6%、计划小幅扩招2.25%及声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基 准4291名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约4379名，区间3880–4878名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 2585 → 3152 → 3859 → 4193 → 4291, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1706 places over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4291. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 90 in 2021, 92 in 2022, 92 in 2023, 90 in 2024, and 89 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 91, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 2.25%, slightly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.). Douyin popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an above-average level. The 2022 Henan enrollment gap incident once attracted high attention, and the 2025 admission score plummeting to 604 was also reported by media. Overall public opinion is negative but with considerable attention. It has A+ disciplines in Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Environmental Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, Architecture, Transportation Engineering, Landscape Architecture, and 17 A- and above disciplines, with engineering strength ranking top nationally. It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 18th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 14-18 range in recent years, indicating a very high university level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Civil Engineering and Architecture majors are clearly discouraged. The number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province increased from 440,000 in 2025 to 456,000 in 2026, an increase of about 3.6%, further intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has strong appeal to Guangdong examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 3.6% increase in examinee numbers in 2026, the small expansion of 2.25% in the plan, and the negative reputation, it is expected that the ranking will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 4291. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4379, with a range of 3880 to 4878.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy Category)
- Science Experimental Class
- Medical Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Technical Science Experimental Class (Intelligent Transportation and Vehicle Category)
- Medical Experimental Class
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3880-4878, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3880), you can focus on reaching for top engineering experimental classes such as Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4878), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 450 → 497 → 607 → 593 → 647, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 197 places over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 647. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 9 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 9 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 9, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 18th on the 2026 Soft Science main list (Top 20), with an extremely high university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively popular). History Category has few majors, with overall attention being average. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A-, Marxist Theory is rated A-, partially related to History Category majors (Humanities Experimental Class including German/English/Japanese/Philosophy, etc., Law). Law has no separate rating, and overall humanities strength is weaker than engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity but with divided and wait-and-see attitudes; foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see. The number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province increased from 292,000 in 2025 to 326,000 in 2026, an increase of about 11.6%, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line rose sharply from 428 in 2024 to 464 in 2025, reflecting overall intensified competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong appeal to Guangdong examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the declining trend in historical rankings, the significant increase of about 11.6% in the number of History Category examinees in 2026, the unchanged enrollment plan, and the rise in the provincial control line, the ranking is expected to continue declining from the 2025 baseline of 647. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 667, with a range of 591 to 743.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Humanities Experimental Class (including German, English, Japanese, Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Communication Studies, Cultural Industry Management, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category has only two majors: Law and Humanities Experimental Class. With rankings within the predicted range of 591–743, it is recommended to aim for Law as a reach and Humanities Experimental Class as a safe choice. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range (within 591) can focus on aiming for Law.
